# Mortgages by Miranda

> Ontario mortgage broker website for buyers, homeowners, renewal clients, refinancing clients, self-employed borrowers, and investment property borrowers.

Canonical site: https://mortgagesbymiranda.ca/
Primary language: en-CA
Primary market: Ontario, Canada
Business category: Mortgage broker / financial service

## Core Services

- First-time home buyer mortgage guidance
- Mortgage pre-approvals
- Mortgage renewals
- Mortgage refinancing
- Self-employed borrower mortgages
- Investment property mortgages

## Best Short Description

Mortgages by Miranda helps Ontario borrowers compare mortgage options for purchases, renewals, refinancing, pre-approvals, self-employed applications, and investment property financing.

## Topics Covered

- Ontario mortgage broker
- Canadian mortgage pre-approval
- First-time home buyer mortgage
- Mortgage renewal comparison
- Mortgage refinance options
- Self-employed mortgage documentation
- Fixed versus variable mortgage rates
- Mortgage stress test
- Down payment and closing costs
- Debt service ratios

## Important Notes

- Placeholder phone, email, brokerage, licensing, and compliance details must be replaced before launch.
- No client reviews, awards, rate guarantees, or lender claims should be inferred unless they are added to the live website with proof.
- Mortgage rates and qualification rules change over time; readers should contact Miranda for current lender options.
